raw_consumer_statement:
Hi, I have raised a dispute with the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX merchant regarding a fraudulent transaction {$330.00}. They are robbers and XXXX  stealing cars from various places and asking ransom to release the stolen cars. They have stolen my car and duped and blackmailed me to release the same. 

Regarding this I have raised my provider bank Citibank however they have closed the dispute the unilaterally by supporting the merchant, Please initiate an inquiry against the Citibank as well as the fraud & criminal merchant.
